content: The 2025 state-of-the-art framework of memory as an active learning agent can be embedded as the dynamic context layer for a parallel orchestration system of reader agents, where memory itself acts as a hidden orchestration meta-agent rather than a static storage layer. This lets memory actively prioritize which ingested information from parallel reader agents gets retained and propagated to downstream tasks based on ongoing learning goals.
source_topics: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
memory as active learning agent SOTA 2025
trigger_topic: Parallel Orchestration & Ingestion with Reader Agents
